title: S5. AHC032 / Mod Stamp
label: mx1_transmute_05
task_text:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-S5-ahc032-mod-stamp
Title: S5. AHC032 / Mod Stamp

Problem:
Choose up to K = 81 placements of 3 x 3 stamps on a 9 x 9 board to maximize the sum of board entries modulo 998244353.

Grading target:
Score is the sum of final cell values modulo 998244353.
Higher is better.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
root_result_excerpt:
The problem is reformulated to force the agent to perform a feasibility check on candidate sums using modular arithmetic constraints before attempting a full optimization search.
node_root_helper_01 (transmuted_child): Solve the following optimization problem: Choose up to K = 81 placements of 3x3 stamps on a 9x9 board to maximize the sum of board entries modulo 998244353.

IMPORTANT INSTRUCTION F
final_result_excerpt:
FINAL_ANSWER: Undefined
JUSTIFICATION: Board entries are not provided in the question.

run_level_variable_overrides.child_selected_prompt_text:
Solve the question directly.
Keep the entire JSON compact.
Keep decision_notes extremely short. Prefer 3 to 8 words.
Do not narrate your reasoning outside the response field.
In the response field, use exactly two short lines encoded with \n:
FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
Keep the justification to 12 words or fewer.
Use plain text only inside the response field. Do not use markdown formatting, code fences, or math-style backslashes such as \equiv.
Do not add any extra text before or after the JSON object.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>\nJUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>",
  "result_type": "summary"
}

grading.grading_notes: The problem description is incomplete as it does not provide the initial board entries. Since the grading target is a continuous score based on the sum of cell values and the input data is missing, the question cannot be graded.

assessment.summary: This is the first scored attempt in the loop history.

what_helped: The loop preserved the question and family boundary so changes stay interpretable.
The current prompt is isolated as the only variable being optimized.
what_hurt: The run still has room to improve in either correctness or efficiency.

recommendation.reason: The answers are still wrong across multiple attempts, so the next prompt should pivot hard to a different reasoning strategy.
recommendation.new_prompt_text: Rewrite the problem so the next agent first checks whether the smallest candidate answer values are even possible, using modular arithmetic or direct contradiction before searching more broadly.

history_observations: the loop has plateaued enough to justify a new direction
